f64_fixture_version: n/a — 7B class out of dev-box F64 budget
generated_on: RTX 4070 Laptop (sm_89), 8 GB VRAM, 32 GB RAM, Windows 11
config_compatibility_notes: Falcon3-7B-Instruct ships with HuggingFace `LlamaForCausalLM` architecture and a scalar `eos_token_id=11` — fully compatible with Atenia's existing Llama-family loader and config parser. GQA real (12 query heads / 4 KV heads). Explicit `head_dim=256` decouples from the hidden_size/num_heads ratio (already supported via `LlamaConfig::effective_head_dim()`).

certified_mode.validation_notes: F64 reference not generated for 7B-class checkpoints on the dev box (peak memory budget for F64 forward exceeds 32 GB). Validation falls back to greedy generation smoke under both modes, comparing argmax and decoded text.

fast_mode.validation_notes: Drift envelope inherited from ADR-005 family characterisation. Falcon3 7B is not in the F64 fixture; treat fast-mode drift on this checkpoint as 'industry-standard BF16-TC' with the ADR-005 caveat applied.

smoke_validation.prompt: Tell me about the history of Rome
smoke_validation.certified_text: The history of Rome is a rich tapestry that spans over two millennia, from its legendary founding in
smoke_validation.fast_text: The history of Rome is a rich tapestry that spans over two millennia, from its legendary founding in
smoke_validation.interpretation: Bit-identical generated text under both modes on this prompt. Fast mode tier-plan moves more tensors to VRAM (116 vs 52 — 2.2× capacity boost from BF16 storage). Falcon3's GQA (12 Q / 4 KV heads) keeps the attention weights compact, so a higher fraction of the parameter count is in FFN — the per-tensor heuristic below routes those to fast.

recommended_mode_rationale: Without an F64 ground-truth reference for Falcon3 7B, the conservative default is the certified path. Fast mode produced bit-identical argmax in this single-prompt smoke. Operators wanting the 1.20× speedup can opt in via per-tensor policy (the FFN-only heuristic below covers the structural case) or via ATENIA_FAST_MODE=1 env override.
per_tensor_policy_status: Schema v2.0.0 (M11.A) — same structural heuristic as the rest of the M11.A Llama-family expansion (Mistral 7B v0.3) and the M4.6 fixture (TinyLlama / SmolLM2 / Llama 3.2): FFN gate/up/down on fast, attention Q/K/V/O on certified. Heuristic is not F64-validated for Falcon3; consistent with literature finding that FFN tolerates BF16-TC drift more readily than attention.

verification.command_certified: ATENIA_M8_BF16_KERNEL=1 ATENIA_M8_7_ENABLED=1 ATENIA_DISK_TIER_DIR=<cache> atenia generate --prompt 'Tell me about the history of Rome' --model models/falcon3-7b-instruct --max-tokens 20
verification.command_fast: ATENIA_FAST_MODE=1 ATENIA_M8_7_ENABLED=1 ATENIA_DISK_TIER_DIR=<cache> atenia generate --prompt 'Tell me about the history of Rome' --model models/falcon3-7b-instruct --max-tokens 20
verification.expected_text_prefix: The history of Rome is a rich tapestry that spans over two millennia
